prompt_queue.prompt: Industry: home goods and craft. Generate one distinct, buildable store concept for the home goods and craft industry. Examples of valid sub-spaces: ceramics and tableware, textiles and bedding, lighting, woodworking supplies, leatherwork, fiber arts and yarn, marbling and bookbinding, candles and soap, small-batch furniture, restoration tooling. Stay inside home and craft; do not drift into general apparel, food, or pure decor without a craft angle.
